title: Once Upon a Time
writer: Holger Drachmann, Carl Theodor Dreyer, Palle Rosenkrantz
actors: Clara Pontoppidan, Svend Methling, Peter Jerndorff
plot: A beautiful but imperious princess refuses all offers of marriage, often condemning her suitors to death. The prince of Denmark comes seeking her hand and, aided by magic objects given to him by a mysterious spirit, seeks to win h...
